office_does: The assessor values taxable property, maintains property records, and supports equitable distribution of property-tax liabilities.
race_blurb: Incumbent Drew Jenkins faces state-accredited appraiser Justin Moriarty in a rematch of the 2025 unexpired-term election.

candidates.summary: Moriarty is a state-accredited appraiser who previously ran for assessor in 2025; the dossier contains no detailed 2026 platform.

experience.basis: Current appraisal accreditation and a prior assessor candidacy provide relevant experience, without an incumbent office record.

candidates.summary: Jenkins is the incumbent assessor with a long documented appraisal record in Wahkiakum County and Chicago.
highlights: Worked in the assessor's office from 2016 through 2023 [S3]
Reports 13 earlier years as a residential appraiser [S3]

experience.basis: Incumbency and a long directly relevant appraisal record support the maximal proven-record placement.
